name: Island Coffee
note: If you are an early riser, they have piping hot muffins and croissants delivered every morning between 6 and 6:30am. They are worth getting up for.

name: Roast'd General Store
note: Get a coffee and then cross the street to go into the parking lot with the "land bank" sign. Walk down the gravel path and you will end up at the most beautiful spot with a view of the harbor. (They also have locations inside the mid-island Stop and Shop and Bartlett's Farm)

name: Surfside
note: A great place to go after the show. They do a $10 happy hour menu after 10pm.

name: Something Natural
note: Excellent sandwiches and cookies. About half a mile from town.

name: The Brotherhood of Thieves
note: Downstairs it is an old whaling tavern. Upstairs, it is a surfer situation. Out back, there is a patio with tvs for sports fans. Everything on the menu is good.

name: Lemon Press
note: Upstairs is a really cute restaurant with yummy breakfast.

name: The Tap Room
note: They have fancier dishes, but we love their burgers and wings.

name: Faregrounds
note: Sports bar.

name: Kitty Murtagh's
note: Irish pub.

name: The Airport
note: Yes, seriously. Like a NY diner menu.

name: Millie's
note: Tacos.

name: Boat House
note: Tacos, Jamaican food, Indian food, burgers.

name: Wicked Island Bakery
note: Incredible.

name: Surfside Beach Snack Shack
note: Best burger on the island. You sit at a picnic table with a panoramic view of the ocean. It is a must. You can drive there or take the Wave. There is also a bike path.

name: The Juice Bar
note: Everything is made in house. It is sooooo good. Treat yourself to a freshly made waffle cone. No tasters. This is walking distance from town.

name: Island Kitchen
note: This is my personal favorite. They make everything in house. Every flavor is delicious. They will let you taste. If you want all of the flavors, you need to drive there. But you can get a limited selection of their flavors at the pharmacy on Main St., which is walking distance from town.

name: Hospital Thrift Shop
note: Cate and I go here at least 3 times a week. I wish I was exaggerating, but I'm not. The inventory turns over very quickly, and it is hit or miss. But when you hit, you hit hard. As an example, last week my mom got a mint condition Cole Haan handbag for $7.50. Walking distance from town.

name: Commonwealth
note: Consignment shop within walking distance. It has great stuff. Some super high end labels, but also some normal people options.

name: Rainbow Fleet
note: Consignment shop just over a mile from town (next door to Roast'd General Store). Their selection is amazing. And if you are into vintage, they also have a great vintage room.

name: Jetties Beach
note: Great sunset here. No waves. Always safe to swim. There is a restaurant/bar and a bathroom. One mile from town.

name: Steps Beach
note: Stunning. The perfect sunset location. No waves. Always safe to swim. No bathroom. As the name suggests, lots of stairs. One mile from town.

name: Cisco Beach
note: Driving distance from town. Waves and surfing. Lifeguards on duty. Bathrooms. Hot dog stand. Only a few feet from the parking lot to the sand.

name: Surfside Beach
note: Driving distance from town. Waves. Lifeguards on duty. Bathrooms. Best burger on the island. Island Kitchen ice cream. A bit of a walk from the parking lot to the sand.

name: Madaquecham Beach
note: Totally secluded and stunningly beautiful. No lifeguards on duty. Please be careful. It is a trek to get there, but it is totally worth it. No food. No bathrooms.

name: Dionis Beach
note: No waves. Lifeguards on duty. Bathrooms. No food.

name: Madaket Beach
note: Driving distance from town. Waves. Lifeguards on duty. Food and ice cream. Bathrooms.

name: Miacomet Beach
note: Driving distance from town. Waves. Very unusual location because there is a freshwater pond on the beach. Lifeguards on duty. Bathrooms. No food.

name: Nantucket Whaling Museum
note: Non-negotiable.

name: Brant Point Lighthouse
note: Non-negotiable. Visit the lighthouses.

name: Sankaty Head Lighthouse
note: Non-negotiable. Visit the lighthouses.

name: Great Point Lighthouse
note: Non-negotiable. Visit the lighthouses.

name: Sconset Bluff Walk
note: Non-negotiable. Walk the Sconset Bluff.

name: Nantucket Drive-In
note: Non-negotiable. Go to the drive-in.

name: Bartlett's Farm
note: Non-negotiable. Get veggies at Bartlett's Farm.

name: Linda Loring Nature Foundation
note: The Linda Loring Foundation has free programming if you are interested in bird watching or learning about the ecology of the island.
